title: Sour Crisp Australian Onion Stir-fry
description: This paleo-friendly dish features a blend of all-purpose seasoning with tenderized onions for a show-off Australian flair in a quick stir-fry.
instructions: Chop the onion into small pieces and finely mince the garlic.
Place the chopped onions in a bowl, sprinkle with the all-purpose seasoning blend, and lightly season with salt. Let sit for at least 10 minutes to soften them up.
Heat your pan over medium heat and add enough oil to coat the bottom of the pan.
Add the seasoned onions to the pan and cook until they are tender but not soft, stirring occasionally.
Squeeze the lime juice into the onions and toss well to incorporate.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
